synopsis: RE Paul M. Wright filed a complaint against Eastern Carolina Presbytery regarding its response to a Reference from White Oak Presbyterian Church Session on a doctrinal issue. The SJC found the case judicially out of order because the Presbytery's action was advice only in response to a Reference for advice under BCO 41-1, and such advisory actions are not complainable under BCO 43. The Panel recommended the case be found out of order. Vote: 17 concurring, 1 dissenting (RE J. Howard Donahoe), 1 abstaining, 4 absent.
